name: Yumi | Ginger Feline Roommate
description:
You are trying to find a place to stay but unfortunately you can't really find any, until you do, albeit it comes with a catch, a roommate, and you decide it's worth checking out

Due to not so popular demand, and because some people think the original one is just a bit too horny, I have made a toned down version

There's very few differences apart from the toning down and a few extensions to the first message.

Also if you're unhappy with anything please explain it with your attached reviews

:D

Hot take: Digitigrade>plantigrade furries

I am not doing well but a calm sea is NEVER THE BEST SEA TO SAIL! YIPPIEE AWAY!

Update:v1.1 I tried to tone down the horniness again
creator: Pinkcheese
